dtcs.description: Aston Martin — Front camera obstructed (DBX ADAS)
Aston Martin DBX — Air-suspension compressor performance

Aston Martin — Bilstein DTX adaptive damper drive circuit
Aston Martin V8 (M177 twin-turbo) — Turbocharger overboost condition
Turbocharger Underboost (AMG M178 / AML V12)
repair_guidance: 1) Confirm boost target vs actual via live data.
2) Smoke-test the intake / charge-air system for leaks.
3) Inspect wastegate solenoid and actuator rod travel.
4) Check for cracked CAC, intercooler, or hose clamps.
5) Replace failed solenoid / actuator if signal correct.

Aston Martin Valhalla — HV battery isolation fault
HV Battery Imbalance (Aston Martin Hybrid)
repair_guidance: 1) Check pack SOH, cell delta, and individual cell voltages.
3) Inspect HV connectors for corrosion / arcing damage.
4) Test pack isolation — replace damaged module if isolation low.
